## Summary
- What changed and why

## User-visible changes
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Parsing/format behavior
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Docs/governance only

## Validation
- [ ] Built successfully (`make` or Docker devkitpro image)
- [ ] Smoke-tested navigation (library/book/settings)
- [ ] Smoke-tested at least one EPUB
- [ ] Smoke-tested at least one non-EPUB format
- [ ] No generated artifacts tracked by git

## Risks / notes
- Any known edge-cases or follow-up work
